ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock type */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock type (e.g., Regular Stock, Low Stock) */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current level of stock */,
  "purchase_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stock purchased */,
  "mrp" REAL /* Maximum Retail Price (MRP) */,
  "wholesale_price" REAL /* Wholesale price for bulk purchases */,
  "regular_price" REAL /* Regular retail price for individual sales */,
  "offer_price" REAL /* Price during special offers or discounts */,
  "stock_category" TEXT /* Category of the stock (e.g., Electronics, Clothing) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which stock should be reordered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to order when stock falls below reorder level */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "store_open_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., Flagship, Outlet) */,
  "customer_traffic" INTEGER /* Average daily customer traffic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "previous_experience" TEXT /* Previous experience of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store making the purchase */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock type being purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stock purchased */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the purchase */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "purchase_order_number" TEXT /* Purchase order number */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store making the sale */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock type being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stock sold */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of stock */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue from the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer (if applicable) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Cash, Credit Card) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock type on offer */,
  "offer_name" TEXT /* Name of the offer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the offer */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the offer */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage applied during the offer */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the offer (e.g., Students, Seniors) */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code for the offer */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum spend required to avail the offer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, clerk) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the user is associated with */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., inventory, sales, reports) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., inventory, sales, financial) */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory change */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the change occurred */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock type affected */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., purchase, sale, adjustment) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stock changed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who made the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, sale, refund) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the transaction */,
  "bank_account" TEXT /* Bank account details for the transaction */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer feedback */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the feedback was given */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock type the feedback is about */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase related to the feedback */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who served the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)
